prompts.name: Relaxed Standing
prompts.text: Pose the subject standing naturally with balanced weight, relaxed shoulders, believable posture, and a calm everyday presence.

prompts.name: Confident Standing
prompts.text: Pose the subject standing confidently with strong posture, lifted chin, composed body language, and a clear sense of presence.

prompts.name: Sitting on Floor
prompts.text: Pose the subject sitting comfortably on the floor with natural leg placement, relaxed arms, and believable body balance.

prompts.name: Sitting on Chair
prompts.text: Pose the subject sitting naturally on a chair with realistic posture, comfortable weight distribution, and relaxed body language.

prompts.name: Kneeling
prompts.text: Pose the subject kneeling gracefully with elegant posture, balanced hands, and a calm expressive silhouette.

prompts.name: Walking
prompts.text: Pose the subject walking naturally with believable motion, proper weight shift, and relaxed limb placement.

prompts.name: Running
prompts.text: Pose the subject running dynamically with energetic movement, flowing hair or clothing, and a clear sense of direction.

prompts.name: Looking Back
prompts.text: Pose the subject looking back over one shoulder with natural torso rotation, expressive eye contact, and a cinematic silhouette.

prompts.name: Leaning Against Wall
prompts.text: Pose the subject leaning casually against a wall with relaxed posture and natural body weight.

prompts.name: Stretching
prompts.text: Pose the subject stretching naturally with extended limbs, relaxed muscles, and believable anatomy.

prompts.name: Mid Jump
prompts.text: Capture the subject mid-jump with dynamic movement, lifted hair or clothing, and a lively sense of energy.

prompts.name: Reaching Out
prompts.text: Pose the subject reaching gently toward the viewer, creating depth, connection, and visual engagement.

prompts.name: Crouching
prompts.text: Pose the subject crouching low with stable balance, natural limb placement, and an alert expression.

prompts.name: Dancing
prompts.text: Pose the subject dancing gracefully with flowing movement, expressive rhythm, and elegant body lines.

prompts.name: Sleeping Pose
prompts.text: Pose the subject sleeping peacefully with relaxed features, soft body position, and a calm atmosphere.
